subheadline: An independent board of operators and investors who have scaled companies from seed to IPO.

members.name: Sofia Berg
members.title: Board Chair
members.bio: Led Northwind from Series A to a public listing, scaling the team past 2,000 people across nine markets.

members.name: Noah Ritter
members.title: Independent Director
members.bio: Early-stage investor in 30+ B2B software companies, with five exits above one billion dollars.

members.name: Lea Fischer
members.title: Independent Director
members.bio: Brings two decades of financial leadership and audit-committee experience in regulated industries.
